structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-09-12 Benchmark Coupon Update
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-09-11 15:02:50-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

NOVA’s benchmark coupon will be updated effective 09/12/25 to accommodate the shift in the locked pipeline.  The benchmark coupon will shift from the UMBS30 6 to the 5.5.  A sample grid 

from the daily commentary has been provided below for reference.  

 



 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Product inquiries, contact Product (ProductDept@novahomeloans.com <mailto:ProductDept@novahomeloans.com> ) 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk (lock.desk@novahomeloans.com <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> )

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
